profile.title: Welcome Home
profile.description: Here you'll see your name and your stats at a glance — how many teams you're in, upcoming games, and total events.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.description: Set your availability to find a game, create a new event (training, game, or social), or browse and join a team.

eventTypes.title: 3 Types of Events
eventTypes.description: Training — practice sessions with your team. Game — competitive matches against opponents. Social — casual meetups, watch parties, and team bonding.

games.title: Your Events & Games
games.description: See your upcoming events of all types, games looking for players you can join, and match proposals waiting for your response.

feed.title: Activity Feed
feed.description: Stay updated with your teams and community activities.

navigation.title: Navigate the App
navigation.description: Use the bottom bar to switch between Home, Events, Teams, and your Profile.
